title: Accelerated Vesting Response

accelerationTrigger.description: The name of the event that will trigger vesting acceleration: TERMINATION_WITHOUT_CAUSE, RESIGNATION_FOR_GOOD_REASON, or CHANGE_OF_CONTROL

accelerationPeriod.description: The number of months after the trigger event that vesting acceleration will occur (0 to 60). A value > 0 defines a double-trigger acceleration

accelerationPercent.description: The percent of the unvested shares that will be accelerated (1 to 100)

description: List of the vesting acceleration stipulations of the grant. May be empty.
